title: Piramal Pharma Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Piramal Pharma Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Pharma Global Group has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Piramal Pharma Global Group:
Piramal Pharma Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
